signatureAbility.signatureDescription: Defenders with this ability force more catch tackle knockouts in man-to-man versus short routes less than 10 yards from LoS
Pass rushers with this ability will heal some of their fatigue after sacking the QB
Blockers with this ability gain blocker resistance points as a faster rate
Blockers with this ability reduce a rusher's chances of using a quick block shed move while run blocking.
Players with this ability can detect user-controlled defenders before the snap; as well as 3rd and 4th down blitzers. Can be bluffed.
The game's top defenders excel in all situations. When they enter the zone, this ability increases their chance of defeating run blocks, and disrupting catches via tackles.
Defenders with this ability are highly likely to force catch knockouts against running backs.
Players with this ability are harder to knock out of The Zone
Defenders with this ability can still tackle effectively while trying to strip the football.
Some players thrive on making defenders look silly. When they enter the zone, this ability increases their fakeout rate on the next juke, spin or hurdle.
Ballcarriers with this ability have steerable juke animations.
Running backs with this ability have better catch in traffic and route running when coming out of the backfield against linebackers and linemen.
Ballcarriers with this ability will replenish a portion of their stamina upon successfully performing any skill move
Elite pass rushers are a mix of strength, speed, and tenacity. When they enter the zone, this ability increases their win rate and block shed speed against one-on-one pass blocks.
Defenders with this ability can still tackle effectively while trying to strip the football.
Defenders with this ability have a chance to receive dominant bull rush wins when their stamina is full. This consumes additional stamina.
Defenders with this ability use faster, more dominant pass rush moves while rushing from the edge of the defense.
Defenders with this ability can apply pressure to the quarterback from a greater distance.
Blockers with this ability reduce a rusher's chances of using a quick block shed move while run blocking.
Blockers with this ability gain blocker resistance points as a faster rate
Freight Trains are relentless runners who refuse to go down on first contact. When they enter the zone, this ability increases their chance to break the next tackle.
Locker room pep talks go a long way. Players with this ability can easily enter the Zone in the 2nd half.
